title: HCI + sniffer-in-the-loop BLE debug
description: A real one-directional BLE NUS bug seen across all three observability layers, captured from nRF hardware: the central connects and discovers the peripheral's Nordic UART Service but never subscribes (it skips bt_nus_subscribe_receive), so peripheral→central data is silently dropped. The app log shows nothing received, the HCI host↔controller trace shows no CCCD write, and the over-the-air sniffer shows no notifications. Hardware-adaptive: explained from pre-captured logs with no hardware, or reproduced live on a connected DK (+ sniffer dongle).
bugSummary: discovery_complete() calls bt_nus_handles_assign() but never bt_nus_subscribe_receive(), so the central never subscribes to the peripheral's NUS TX notifications — peripheral→central data is silently dropped. Visible at all three layers: no CCCD write in HCI, no notifications on air, nothing received in the app log.
honestLabel: Real captures from live nRF DKs + an nRF Sniffer dongle: app RTT, HCI monitor (CONFIG_BT_DEBUG_MONITOR_RTT), and over-the-air PCAP — buggy and fixed runs, all decoded by Adsum's own rail.
